title: Peaks Doctor Report
description: The envelope emitted by `peaks doctor --json` (data field). Each check.id uses a `<prefix>:<target>` form so callers can route follow-up actions per category.

id.description: Stable check id. Known prefixes: skill:<name> (required skill present), skill-name:<dir> (directory matches declared name), skill-parse:<dir> (skill metadata parsed), skill-runbook:<name> (Default runbook section exists), skill-apply-note:<name> (destructive --apply lines carry an authorization/--dry-run note), schema:<file> (schema file exists and is valid JSON), config:<scope> (optional config locations).
